Hagong Zhongke Technology (Jiangsu) Co., Ltd. presents an extreme, almost comical, cross-domain hallucination. Despite a registered name implying high-tech pedigree ('Hagong' hinting at Harbin Institute of Technology, 'Zhongke' hinting at Chinese Academy of Sciences) and an official classification of 'Electronic Device Manufacturing', the forensic Dual-Veto engine shatters this illusion. The entity operates with a critically low footprint of 2 insured employees and a registered address of 'Room 112' in a commercial block.
